text:

Patch to update graphics/maim to 3.4.45

Hi,
I am the maintainer of the port graphics/maim, and have a patch to update the port to it's latest version: 3.4.45. The poudriere build log will be uploaded shortly.
Thanks,
Neel Chauhan
